---
name: oncall rotation 2026
description: platform oncall schedule for calendar year 2026
type: project
created: 2025-12-28
tags: [oncall, schedule]
---

The 2026 platform oncall rotation runs in two-week shifts.

**Why:** two-week shifts are long enough to context-switch into oncall
mode but short enough that nobody gets stuck with a holiday period
twice in a row.

**How to apply:** schedule lives in the platform-oncall Linear project;
swap requests go through the oncall-swap channel, not DMs.
